name: Child-detail screen renders 'Loading…' as the child's name
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-06] no top-level loading branch; childName falls back to t('common.loading') so 'Loading…' renders as the child's H2 name. Fix: add explicit loading branch before main return.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the child detail screen computes childName as child?.displayName ?? ownedProfile?.displayName ?? t(common.loading) before an explicit top-level loading branch, letting the main H2 render Loading as if it were the child name. Variants: (1) child detail/dashboard data still loading and no owned profile displayName; (2) dashboard fallback still loading for the requested child. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/child/[profileId]/index.test.tsx fails without the fix and passes when loading renders a loader/skeleton state, never an H2/name field containing common.loading.
